name: Hirakata Park
description: Hirakata Park (ひらかたパーク) is an amusement park in Hirakata, Osaka, Japan, nicknamed "Hirapah".  The park is managed by Keihan Leisure Service and is located on the Keihan line at Hirakata-kōen Station (枚方公園駅).  It takes advantage of its hilly landscape to site 43 attractions on 160000 sqm.
